def positive_iterator_argument_consumed_then_reused_later():
    rule_id = "iterator_argument_consumed_then_reused_later"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag functions that exhaust an iterator and later treat it as if it were reusable data."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
